options.name: -ascend
options.description: Specifies that the report in ascending order, should specify option -byTNS or -byWNS

options.name: -byTNS
options.description: The TNS value will be specified as the sorting key, should specify option -ascend or -descend

options.name: -byWNS
options.description: The WNS value will be specified as the sorting key, should specify option -ascend or -descend

options.name: -descend
options.description: Specifies that the report in descending order, should specify option -byTNS or -byWNS

options.name: -no_frame_fix_width
options.description: Specifies that the table columns have a fixed minimum width, but no maximum width

options.name: -no_split
options.description: Specifies that each column follows the preceding column without splitting to a new line,if the data in one column overruns the next colum

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the name of the category report file. Default : category.rpt.
